title: Golden Globes 2026 Prediction Market Analysis
text: Covers provides an analysis of Golden Globes 2026 prediction markets with focus on acting categories. The article notes that One Battle After Another leads with nine nominations across multiple categories, including Best Motion Picture and Best Screenplay. In Best Actor in Motion Picture Drama, Wagner Moura is positioned as the frontrunner for his role in Secret Agent, described as having serious chances of being named best actor according to prediction markets. Best Actress in Motion Picture Drama features Jessie Buckley leading for her portrayal in Hamnet, though the analysis notes Buckley's only real competition comes from Renate Reinsve in Sentimental Value. The ceremony takes place January 11, 2026. The analysis suggests competitive races across multiple categories with prediction markets reflecting strong confidence in certain frontrunners while showing uncertainty in others.
